message:
🐛 Show all 5 agents in Token Usage and left-align labels (#74)

Previously agents with no data or 0 tokens were hidden from the
Token Usage panel. Now all 5 agents (scanner, reviewer, architect,
outreach, supervisor) always appear, even when at 0.

Also left-aligns token stat labels so they sit directly under their
associated number and sparkline instead of floating right.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
